text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: On a day off, I head over to the park<n>and...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: HUUUUUP!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Argh, I need to be faster and flashier...<n>But how?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Don't creep up on me like<n>that! I thought
you were a baddie!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I suppose I'll tell you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
This is top secret, but... I'm preparing<n>a new
super cool special move for my<n>next race!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Just as my opponents let their guards<n>down... I'll
speed up super fast and<n>overtake 'em all in a
flash!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I call it... the Pegasus Mach Strike!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Only problem is... I don't have a lot of<n>time before
my next race.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm training on my days<n>off as well
to perfect the Pegasus<n>Mach Strike!
choice_data_list: That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm training on my days<n>off as well
to perfect the Pegasus<n>Mach Strike!
choice_data_list: That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
That strike thing sounds pretty neat.
You shouldn't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's not "that strike thing"! It's the<n>Pegasus
Mach Strike! It's my special<n>move, so say it
right!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But you're totally right! It issuper neat! The coolest thing ever! Infact, everyone should have their ownspecial move!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I've been kinda worried, though.<n>Like... is my
special move too normal,<n>you think?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I kinda feel like it should be<n>something flashy
that'll grab people's<n>attention.
choice_data_list:
Even a normal skill can be special if it's
perfected.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's a neat way to look at it! Come<n>to think of
it, Carrot Ranger's special<n>move is just a punch!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that settles it—I won't waver!<n>I'll keep
working on this move up until<n>my race! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I think someone told Carrot<n>Ranger
something along those lines<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But Carrot Ranger didn't take their<n>advice and
kept training and training<n>and...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
No, she lost because she was so<n>exhausted
from all her training.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But afterwards, she rested up<n>properly and
became even more<n>powerful than before.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I get it now. I was just about to<n>put myself in
the same position and<n>lose.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm gonna stop pushing<n>myself and
make sure I have a full<n>tank of energy for my
race.
